items.summary: Fix the sign out (logout) functionality in both AppHeader.tsx and AppSidebar.tsx so that clicking the logout/sign out option correctly terminates the user session, clears relevant app state, and redirects the user to the landing page without errors.

Update the backend account deletion logic in backend/main.mo so that when a user profile is deleted, the user's complaints remain in the system and are NOT removed. Complaints should be preserved and remain accessible to HOD/admin after the submitting account is deleted.

Update DeleteAccountDialog.tsx so that after account deletion, it only clears the user's own profile-related localStorage keys and does NOT delete complaint metadata stored in localComplaintStore for complaints submitted by that user.
